title: 5X White 20mm x 20mm Metal Swivel Self-Adhesive Hooks - Removable Strong Sticky Door Bathroom Towel Coat Picture Wall Hanging Hangers - by Ashley
features: These ABS & metal material hooks are self adhesive making them easy to attach & remove with no tools required.
They can be reused with any self adhesive tape & will not damage the adhered surface.
They are ideal for use around the home, in the office etc.
2 Year Warranty - With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
